description: SendCanary non-sending domain lockdown: for domains that don't send email at all (holding companies, placeholder brands, legacy registrations, personal sites), publishes DMARC p=reject plus SPF 'v=spf1 -all' to refuse every sender. Attackers can't spoof an actively rejected domain, and aggregate reports let you watch for attempts. Use this the moment you register a domain you don't plan to send from. Pair with the revert-lockdown template if the domain later needs to start sending. SendCanary (https://sendcanary.com) is an email authentication platform that monitors DMARC reports, detects spoofing, and automates DNS remediation for domain owners.
variableDescription: ruaAddress: email address that will receive DMARC aggregate reports for this locked-down domain (e.g. security@yourcompany.com). Keep this mailbox monitored so you notice when someone tries to spoof you.
